Scripnote is an AI financial advisor that helps individuals and businesses plan, track, and improve their finances with budgeting, cash flow, and insights.

Key terms: AI financial advisor, personal finance, business finance, budgeting, cash flow, net worth, savings, debt payoff, investing, financial planning

## Core pages
- [Home](https://www.scripnote.com/): AI financial advisor overview and product highlights.
- [Individual](https://www.scripnote.com/individual/): Personal finance features and use cases.
- [Company](https://www.scripnote.com/company/): Business finance features and use cases.
- [Pricing](https://www.scripnote.com/pricing/): Plans and pricing details.
- [About](https://www.scripnote.com/about/): Company mission and values.
- [Contact](https://www.scripnote.com/contact/): Contact information and FAQs.
- [Press kit](https://www.scripnote.com/press-kit/): Brand assets and downloads.

## Calculators
- [Savings calculator](https://www.scripnote.com/savings-calculator/): Savings growth with contributions and interest.
- [Debt calculator](https://www.scripnote.com/debt-calculator/): Debt payoff timeline and interest impact.
- [Investments calculator](https://www.scripnote.com/investments-calculator/): Investment growth with compounding.
- [Purchasing power calculator](https://www.scripnote.com/purchasing-power-calculator/): Inflation-adjusted value comparisons.

## Legal
- [Privacy policy](https://www.scripnote.com/privacy-policy/): Data handling and privacy practices.
- [Terms of service](https://www.scripnote.com/terms-of-service/): Terms and conditions.
- [Cookie policy](https://www.scripnote.com/cookie-policy/): Cookie usage and preferences.
